scripts.prepare: node scripts/patch-dts-generator.js && bunx rimraf types && bunx dts-bundle-generator src/index.ts --no-check --project=tsconfig.build.json -o=types/index.d.ts && bunx dts-bundle-generator src/extra.ts --no-check --project=tsconfig.build.json -o=types/extra.d.ts && node scripts/patch-types.js && bunx rimraf dist && node scripts/build.js
scripts.test: node scripts/patch-dts-generator.js && bunx rimraf types && bunx dts-bundle-generator src/index.ts --no-check --project=tsconfig.build.json -o=types/index.d.ts && bunx dts-bundle-generator src/extra.ts --no-check --project=tsconfig.build.json -o=types/extra.d.ts && node scripts/patch-types.js && bunx rimraf dist && node scripts/build.js && bunx vitest run --config vitest.node.config.ts && bunx vitest run
scripts.type: bunx rimraf types && bunx dts-bundle-generator src/index.ts --no-check --project=tsconfig.build.json -o=types/index.d.ts && bunx dts-bundle-generator src/extra.ts --no-check --project=tsconfig.build.json -o=types/extra.d.ts
scripts.prepublishOnly: bunx eslint . --config .eslintrc.cjs --rule "prettier/prettier: error" && node scripts/patch-dts-generator.js && bunx rimraf types && bunx dts-bundle-generator src/index.ts --no-check --project=tsconfig.build.json -o=types/index.d.ts && bunx dts-bundle-generator src/extra.ts --no-check --project=tsconfig.build.json -o=types/extra.d.ts && node scripts/patch-types.js && bunx rimraf dist && node scripts/build.js && bunx vitest run --config vitest.node.config.ts && bunx vitest run
